headline: Is Apollo Global Management (APO) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: Wondering whether Apollo Global Management at around US$107 a share is giving you value or just volatility? This article breaks down what that price could actually represent. The stock has recently been mixed, with a 2.7% decline over the last 7 days, flat performance over 30 days, a 27.0% decline year to date, but much stronger 84.9% and 155.6% returns over the past 3 and 5 years. Recent headlines around Apollo have focused on its role as a large alternative asset manager and its activity...
